raw_text: Awesome experience! Ordered grocery, milk, earphones, and chips, and got everything delivered super fast. Outside weather is too cold and I have a fever 🥵, so this saved me from going out. Really happy with the quick service and saved time!

Product ordered was in very poor condition as it was not functioning properly and also the care team is not supportive at all and moreover to that 1 rs. product was missing from the package 📦. Overall worst experience and not trust worthy.

I order many time and I am regularl customer today I order upto 2200 and one item worth 464 missing in package once I know after checking the package I inform to help center , they told we deliver and we can't help more , no resolution from support team .

totally useless app is this one time they show that this product is available and when I order suddenly it's not in list sorry and all they taking delivery charges to so I cancelled order till the time they stopped cash on delivery on my account before deleting this app I want to know you people that flipkart minutes are much better then them they never did that and also they didn't have any coustomer service thing in that app so just don't use this app it's not worthy

please don't ever buy anything from Blinkit there customer support is extremely bad. Zepto or Instamart is far better than Blinkit. I ordered one gaming controller and I do not find it useful they are not returning it. from now onwards I will never use Blinkit to order anything. customer support is told to not return any product. wherever zepto is far good they return whatever we don't feel good. Buy anything from here on your own risk.

Blinkit is good for any pre-packaged items like cooking oil, bread, butter, rice, pulses etc. But you need more oversight when it comes to fresh items like fruits & vegetables. Most often the quality of items are not ready for cooking/consumption. No doubt, customer care promptly replaces or refunds upon complaints received. But people have little time to take photos & request for replacements etc. It would help if you improved your quality checks on daily use of fresh items. thanks
the service is great and you could find every product even if it's imported here . it's easy to use time saving . overall it's a great app

Worst team. yesterday I ordered 24 pieces Camlin colour pencils. The delivery was late & when I asked the delivery agent he said it was late near packing stage. When I opened the bag colour pencils outer cover & 1 colour were missing. I immediately complained in the app's help desk, 1 executive spoke &arranged replacement immediately. But they cancelled the replacement and there's no proper contact now to raise the issue.. I put a mail but there's no response yet. Resolve my issue immediately.
they do charge a minimal handling fee but very useful for your last minute delivery. They have a wide range of products listed over there platform and usually have everything I have ever needed

worst experience, sometimes the order places itself if we add something into cart if the payment method is cod..... and even if we want to cancel order even within 30 seconds of placing order, we can't cancel

Customer service not responding. Previously they had a chat bot now everything is redirected to a email which never replies on time & doesn't give full resolution. Most of the items that comes from blinkit nowadays have downgraded either it's the package/ insects in it, or broken or the entire bag is torn!

I ordered a Lifelong hot water bag from Blinkit, but the charging cord was missing from the package. Very disappointed with this experience as the product is incomplete and unusable without the cord. I emailed them about this issue but received no response in 24 hours despite them stating they would. Worse customer support! I'm still waiting for resolution and a replacement charging cord. Blinkit needs to ensure all items are properly packed before delivery and improve their customer support.

horrible experience. had ordered new earbuds and the driver was very rude and asked me to come out of the apt and meet him somewhere else behind the apt. and kept complaining Abt how far the main gate is but as far as ik it is around 50m away and he didn't respond at all. Very disappointing experience and I think zepto is much better with handling all these.

I had a very poor experience with Blinkit. I ordered household items for my home while sitting at my office, about 5 km away. While placing the order, I selected my home address correctly. However, after payment, the delivery location automatically changed to my office address, and the app showed that my home address was not serviceable. I immediately contacted customer care and requested them to change the delivery address to my home. I clearly explained that I have received many Blinkit orders

I have had absolutely horrible experience regarding return.. 2ltwuce it happened.. Once, the lotion bottle was half empty and horribly dirty, and the second time when I tried to return 2 unopened, seal packed boxes of jet sprays... The customer support was incompetent as always.. and did not do anything to resolve it. just "we are helpless".. as a customer, i felt helpless.. Extremely hopeless!

worst app. every time it shows location unavailable where a slight change from pin location it is available for delivery but I couldn't understand what my location is showing unavailable. this was discussed with the local blinkit team but no action has been taken yet.

awesome app , I got my order within 5to 6 minutes.major problem is the return of the order.If the blinkit add option directly cancels or returns, then this app is great. because many times people order the wrong thing in a hurry so there is so so there is a problem with return, no option.

worst app I think because in few days when I'm am placing my order that time it is working good but at the time or payment, the amount is deducted but it shows order not placed and then it says that it will refund back the money, but doesn't refund it at all, thus I'm deleting this app...a lot waste of money

Hi Team, I have been using Blinkit for around 6 months and never faced any issue. Since last week, both online payment options and Cash on Delivery are not visible in my app, due to which I’m unable to place orders. Kindly check and resolve the issue.
It is a good application whenever I require emergency groceries or anything I want. I just order, and it helps me get all the items I need. It also provides suggestions, which is why it's good.
